name: Rugvista Group AB (publ)
summary: RugVista Group AB (publ) engages in the online retail of carpets and rugs under the RugVista and CarpetVista brands primarily in Europe. The company offers design rugs and traditional rugs. It also offers food accessories, such as anti-slip products and stain removers. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Limhamn, Sweden.
